Contact support Questions? Contact sales On This Page Architecture Getting started Overview Overview Kensho APIs serve as a bridge between Kensho applications and your systems, allowing them to communicate and interact effectively. Our APIs have been developed to give complete control of the following Kensho features within your applications, e.g.: Transforming audio into text with unparalleled accuracy and speed Transforming PDF documents into structured JSON files Identifying and classifying concepts in text Linking database entities to the world's premier financial databases Unlocking the full potential of textual data by linking it to existing sources of structured knowledge Understanding and leveraging Kensho APIs can significantly expand the horizons of what an application can achieve. Elevate your development process by integrating Kensho APIs into your systems right away to create innovative, transformative, AI-driven solutions. Architecture Kensho's public-facing APIs use the REST Architectural Style (opens in a new tab) . Getting started To get started using our APIs, go to the authentication guide to learn how to access Kensho systems.

All Announcements Company Product Research Insights Engineering News Announcements S&P Global expands AI ecosystem reach with Cohere to power trusted, agentic workflows for financial institutions Announcements Announcements News Product Kensho LLM-ready API adds Key Developments and Professionals datasets Product Product Announcements , Product Kensho MCP Apps: Visualize, explore, and interact with S&P Global data inside AI applications Announcements , Product Announcements , Product Engineering , Company Building on moving ground: Life as an MLOps engineer at Kensho Engineering , Company Engineering , Company Engineering How Kensho built a multi-agent framework with LangGraph to solve trusted financial data retrieval Engineering Engineering Announcements S&P Global delivers trusted financial data and insights to customers through ChatGPT Announcements Announcements Announcements S&P Global brings financial skills to AI agents with new plugin Announcements Announcements ● News Archive Announcements , Product Kensho Communications 5/14/26 Announcements , Product Kensho Communications 5/14/26 Kensho MCP Apps: Visualize, explore, and interact with S&P Global data inside AI applications Financial professionals increasingly work inside AI applications like Claude and ChatGPT, but most information they get back is locked in static text. Kensho MCP Apps change that. We've built a suite of applications embedded directly inside AI chat interfaces that turn S&P Global’s data into interactive charts, tables, visualizations, and more, all without ever leaving the conversation. Customers can explore, filter, and ask follow-up questions about the charts and tables in real time, making research faster and more intuitive. Kensho MCP Apps are now available in beta for select customers. Read More Engineering , Company Alec Alameddine 4/28/26 Engineering , Company Alec Alameddine 4/28/26 Building on moving ground: Life as an MLOps engineer at Kensho Over the past two years as an MLOps engineer at Kensho, I’ve come to appreciate both the challenges and the immense value of operating in an environment where implementation patterns, tools, and the surrounding ecosystem are constantly changing. Read More Announcements Kensho Communications 3/5/26 Announcements Kensho Communications 3/5/26 S&P Global delivers trusted financial data and insights to customers through ChatGPT Read More Product Taylor Richardson 9/15/25 Product Taylor Richardson 9/15/25 Kensho LLM-ready API expands MCP server access, dataset support, integrations, and more Announcing remote MCP server support for the Kensho LLM-ready API, which makes it even easier to access trusted S&P Global datasets as a Connector in Claude, or through any MCP-supported GenAI tool. We’ve also rolled out new capabilities and support for a wealth of financial datasets to enable more customer use cases and workflows, from earnings to private markets and beyond. Read More Announcements Kensho Communications 7/15/25 Announcements Kensho Communications 7/15/25 S&P Global and Anthropic announce collaboration to bring trusted financial data into Claude We developed a cutting-edge Model Context Protocol (MCP) server enabling seamless access to S&P Global’s trusted financial and market data through Claude by Anthropic. This integration connects the Kensho LLM-ready API and its wealth of S&P Global datasets–including S&P Capital IQ Financials, earnings call transcripts, and more–to Anthopic’s new Claude for Financial Services Solution. Read More ● Get started Talk to our team about what’s possible At Kensho, you’ll work at the intersection of trusted data, advanced AI, and real-world decision-making. We hire talented people and give them autonomy and support to develop cutting-edge solutions that solve complex business problems.
